pi_items.source: Traced from install_librecad.sh script and verified by direct download and inspection

Public GitHub repository (jscad/sample-files, Apache-licensed). Verified through content analysis: file contains 89 TEXT and 9 MTEXT entities with architectural annotations including 'FLOOR PLAN', '2 CAR GARAGE', 'KITCHEN', 'ENTRY', 'ATTIC', 'WALL', 'DOOR', 'FIREPLACE', dimension annotations, construction notes.
DXF entity analysis using ezdxf library
Counted TEXT entities in modelspace using ezdxf
Counted MTEXT entities in modelspace using ezdxf
Layer enumeration using ezdxf shows 'a-text' layer present. 30 TEXT entities on A-TEXT layer confirm its active use.
Text entity inspection showing examples from A-TEXT layer (construction dimensions and door specifications)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real architectural 2-car garage floor plan (1.07 MB, AC1018 DXF format) from the open-source jscad/sample-files repository. The drawing contains 89 TEXT and 9 MTEXT entities with authentic construction annotations including door specifications ('16070 O.H. DOOR'), room labels ('KITCHEN', 'ENTRY'), and structural notes. The 'a-text' layer exists and contains 30 text entities. The drawing has a defined bounding box with extents from (-724.98, -522.27) to (239.42, 416.28). All claims about data characteristics verified through direct DXF content analysis.
